query:
You are a product analyst building a feature comparison matrix. The subject is the subject company (). Compare it against the 10 competitors below.

Competitors:
  1. name="Nalo", website="https://nalo.fr"
  2. name="Linxo", website="https://linxo.com"
  3. name="Grisbee", website="https://grisbee.com"
  4. name="Horiz.io", website="https://horiz.io"
  5. name="Sharesight", website="https://sharesight.com"
  6. name="InvMon", website="https://invmon.com"
  7. name="Wealthfolio", website="https://ealthfolio.app"
  8. name="Quicken", website="https://quicken.com"
  9. name="Merlin", website="https://merlin.com"
  10. name="Sure", website="https://sure.com"

STEP 1 — Identify 6 to 10 KEY FEATURES that matter when comparing these products. Group them by category (Core / Pricing / Integrations / Enterprise / Mobile). Return as 'features' array with {label, group}. The SAME features list must be used to score every competitor — choose features that are meaningful for all.

STEP 2 — For EACH competitor, return a 'capabilities' array with one entry per feature defined in step 1. Each entry: {feature: '<exact label>', value: '<one of full/part/none/soon>'}. 'full' = covered with a dedicated feature. 'part' = partial / limited coverage. 'none' = not supported. 'soon' = on public roadmap.

STEP 3 — For EACH competitor, also return notable_customers: 3-5 publicly known customers with {name, domain, segment (Grand compte/ETI/PME/Startup/Consumer), industry, evidence (case study URL or quote)}.

Omit any capability you cannot verify — do NOT guess. Return one competitor object per company in the SAME order as the input list. Preserve company names EXACTLY.
answer:
# Executive Summary

Modern wealth management applications are increasingly defined by their ability to consolidate multi-asset portfolios, automate account aggregation via Open Banking, and provide advanced financial planning simulators [Best Portfolio Management Tools for 2026: Top Picks & Features](https://www.investopedia.com/best-portfolio-management-software-tools-11693031). Based on the available data, **Grisbee** offers the most comprehensive multi-asset tracking and white-label enterprise solutions [Outil de gestion de patrimoine - Gérer son patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/outil_gestion_patrimoine/). **Linxo** dominates in Open Finance integrations and B2B API offerings with over 1,700 bank connectors [Accueil - Linxo](https://linxo.com/). **Nalo** differentiates itself through automated portfolio optimization and multi-project life insurance management, though it currently lacks full mobile contract management [Nalo avis : gestion pilotée multi-projets, ça vaut le coup ?](https://signal-alpha.fr/avis-nalo/). 

# Detailed Analysis: Feature Comparison

### Core Capabilities & Portfolio Optimization
The industry standard for core functionality includes tracking traditional holdings alongside alternative assets like cryptocurrencies and real estate [Best Portfolio Management Tools for 2026: Top Picks & Features](https://www.investopedia.com/best-portfolio-management-software-tools-11693031). Grisbee fully supports this diverse asset tracking in real-time [Outil de gestion de patrimoine - Gérer son patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/outil_gestion_patrimoine/). Linxo provides partial multi-asset support, primarily aggregating 34 types of investment accounts via its B2B Wealth API [Optimiser la gestion patrimoniale grâce à l'agrégation de comptes](https://linxo.com/agregation-comptes-gestion-patrimoniale/). Nalo does not offer multi-asset tracking, as its strategy relies exclusively on passive ETF management [Réalisez vos projets avec NALO](https://information.nalo.fr/realisez-vos-projets-avec-assurance-vie-nalo/). However, Nalo excels in automated portfolio optimization through its "sécurisation progressive" feature, which automatically reduces stock exposure as a user's project target date approaches [Avis Nalo : 60K€ investis, mon retour d’expérience ! • Finance Héros](https://finance-heros.fr/avis-nalo/).

### Pricing Models
Standard wealth applications utilize tiered subscription models (e.g., Free, Lite, Plus, Pro) [Les 10 meilleures applications de gestion de budget en 2026](https://finary.com/fr/blog/finance-perso/budget/meilleures-applications-budget). Both Linxo and Grisbee follow this structure; Linxo offers a freemium model with a Premium tier at €30 per year [Linxo, la FinTech qui veut améliorer... - FrenchWeb - 22/02/16](https://www.linxo.com/blog/portfolio-items/linxo-la-fintech-qui-veut-ameliorer-frenchweb-220216/), and Grisbee offers a free basic tool alongside three paid tiers [AVIS GRISBEE - Découvrez votre coach financier en ligne](https://www.jepargneenligne.com/patrimoine/grisbee-avis-agregateur/). Nalo utilizes an Assets Under Management (AUM) fee structure rather than SaaS subscriptions, charging approximately 1.65% annually for life insurance and 1.60% for its PER [Nalo avis : gestion pilotée multi-projets, ça vaut le coup ?](https://signal-alpha.fr/avis-nalo/).

### Integrations & Enterprise Solutions
Automated account aggregation via APIs is a critical integration feature [Les 15 meilleurs logiciels de gestion de patrimoine en 2026](https://culture-financiere.com/meilleurs-logiciels-gestion-patrimoine/). Linxo connects to over 1,700 banks [Accueil - Linxo](https://linxo.com/) and operates a dedicated B2B division, Linxo Connect, providing Open Banking and Open Finance APIs [Linxo Connect - Finance Innovation](https://www.finance-innovation.com/e/open-day-2023/partner/212385af-10c7-ed11-9f73-6045bd8890e4/linxo-connect). Grisbee integrates with approximately 300 financial institutions via its partner Budget Insight, and offers white-label, grey-label, and API integrations for financial advisors [Grisbee Gestion de patrimoine – Applications sur Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.grisbee.app&hl=fr) [Grisbee Outil gestion patrimoine en ligne - Finansemble.fr](https://finansemble.fr/grisbee-outil-gestion-patrimoine/). 

### Mobile Experience
Native iOS and Android experiences are foundational to modern platforms [Best Portfolio Tracker App in 2026: Compared](https://portfoliotrackr.com/blog/best-portfolio-tracker-app). Linxo and Grisbee both offer fully featured native applications [Lancement de notre nouvelle application Linxo Lab](https://linxo.com/lancement-linxo-lab/) [Bonne nouvelle : l'application Grisbee est enfin disponible](https://www.grisbee.fr/lapplication-grisbee-est-enfin-disponible/). Nalo's mobile application is currently limited to budget tracking and does not support the management of life insurance or PER contracts [Nalo avis : gestion pilotée multi-projets, ça vaut le coup ?](https://signal-alpha.fr/avis-nalo/).

---

# Gaps and Limitations
* **Missing Competitor Data:** No research findings were provided for Horiz.io, Sharesight, InvMon, Wealthfolio, Quicken, Merlin, or Sure. To strictly avoid guessing, their capabilities and notable customers have been returned as empty arrays.
* **Unverified Capabilities:** Nalo's capabilities regarding automated account aggregation and white-label/B2B API offerings could not be verified in the provided text and were omitted from its capabilities array. Linxo and Grisbee's automated portfolio optimization capabilities were similarly unverified and omitted.
* **Customer Domains:** Exact website domains for the notable customers (e.g., generali.fr, bforbank.com) were not present in the source findings and have been marked as `null` to prevent adding external knowledge. Customer segments were inferred strictly based on the nature of the entity described in the text (e.g., major banks classified as "Grand compte").
